scripts.build: esbuild src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.js --external:express --external:socket.io --external:socket.io-adapter --external:engine.io --external:pino --external:pino-pretty --external:zod --banner:js="import { createRequire as _cr } from 'node:module'; const require = _cr(import.meta.url);"
